name: Razorpay
description: Razorpay is India's leading full-stack payments gateway supporting credit cards, debit cards, UPI, netbanking, wallets, and EMI. It provides APIs for creating orders, accepting payments, issuing refunds, generating payment links, and managing recurring subscriptions with deep integration into Indian banking infrastructure.

capabilities.name: orders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new order that the customer can pay against. Orders are mandatory before accepting payments.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific order by its ID.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: List all orders with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: payments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific payment.

capabilities.name: payments_list
capabilities.description: List all payments with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: payments_capture
capabilities.description: Capture an authorized payment to complete the fund transfer.

capabilities.name: payments_edit
capabilities.description: Update an existing payment with additional notes.

capabilities.name: payments_fetch_card_details
capabilities.description: Fetch card details for a specific payment.

capabilities.name: refunds_create
capabilities.description: Create a normal refund for a captured payment.

capabilities.name: refunds_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific refund.

capabilities.name: refunds_list
capabilities.description: List all refunds with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: payment_links_create
capabilities.description: Create a shareable payment link that customers can use to pay.

capabilities.name: payment_links_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific payment link.

capabilities.name: payment_links_list
capabilities.description: List all payment links.

capabilities.name: payment_links_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an existing payment link.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a customer record to save payment methods and enable recurring payments.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific customer.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List all customers.

capabilities.name: customers_edit
capabilities.description: Update an existing customer.

capabilities.name: plans_create
capabilities.description: Create a subscription plan with a billing interval and amount.

capabilities.name: plans_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific plan.

capabilities.name: plans_list
capabilities.description: List all plans.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Create a recurring subscription for a customer with a defined billing plan.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List all subscriptions.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an active subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_pause
capabilities.description: Pause an active subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_resume
capabilities.description: Resume a paused subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Update a subscription.

capabilities.name: items_create
capabilities.description: Create an item that can be used in invoices and payment links.

capabilities.name: items_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific item by ID.

capabilities.name: items_list
capabilities.description: List all items.

capabilities.name: items_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing item.

capabilities.name: items_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an item.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Create an invoice and send it to the customer.

capabilities.name: invoices_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific invoice by ID.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List all invoices.

capabilities.name: invoices_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a draft or issued invoice.

capabilities.name: settlements_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific settlement.

capabilities.name: settlements_list
capabilities.description: List all settlements.

capabilities.name: transfers_create
capabilities.description: Create a transfer to route payment to a linked account.

capabilities.name: transfers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific transfer.

capabilities.name: qr_codes_create
capabilities.description: Create a QR code for UPI payments.

capabilities.name: qr_codes_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific QR code.

capabilities.name: qr_codes_list
capabilities.description: List all QR codes.

capabilities.name: qr_codes_close
capabilities.description: Close a QR code so it can no longer accept payments.
